programme.desc: A hot-headed baseball coach finds his work cut out when he takes upon a new coaching assignment with a team that is way below par.

programme.title: Millers in Marriage
programme.desc: Three siblings navigate life’s next chapter in this heartfelt drama about love and second chances.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Forever Knight finally assembles his Round Table of young but super-powerful Knights, including-- Ben?! With Ben's help, Forever Knight leads his new minions in an all-out attack on a Particle Accelerator - his true intention to transform it into a Time Machine and conquer history!

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: The stakes are very high as Ruby wrestles with how to solve a wish that hits close to home. Daniel’s in-laws come for a visit, reopening old wounds.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S5
programme.desc: When Prince Ivandoe gets trapped in the Burpy Bog, Bert asks the mysterious Hooded Hermit for help.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S5
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe charges off into the foggy swamp to find some turnips but finds the feared Bog Lady instead! Meanwhile Bert gets enchanted by the Queen of the Mist.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S5
programme.desc: When Prince Ivandoe discovers a secret chest, guarded by a three headed knight, he is certain the Golden Feather lies within.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: A magic spell brings Ray-Ray's comic book hero and his evil nemesis to life.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S2
programme.desc: Ah-Mah tells Ray-Ray the story of how June became the Te Xuan Ze.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows - Part 1
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione leave Hogwarts behind on a mission to destroy the Horcruxes, the secrets to Voldemort's power and immortality.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows - Part 2
programme.desc: The time has come, the fate foretold in the prophecy draws near: the confrontation to the death between Harry Potter and Lord Voldemort.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Kevin 11 gives Xingo a power up - setting him loose to wreak havoc on other TV shows - and it is up to Ben to stop them both.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson stops in at a fringe family reunion, and Ben encounters a whole lot more than kooky cousins-- namely, Kevin 11 and the Bugg Brothers, whose latest crackpot invention sparks a series of hilarious head-swaps between all parties.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Zombozo hypnotizes Grandpa Max's entire baking class, it is up to Ben and Gwen to clean up the mess, but it gets even messier when Zombozo unveils his new bodyguard: Kevin 11!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson's thrift store shopping is ruined by the latest high-speed heist of LaGrange -- who is now aided by a super-fast electromagnetic racing car -- and Ben must convince Kevin 11 to help stop the speed demon's globetrotting robbing spree.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: After Ben easily dispatches the Weatherheads, Team Tennyson travels to a ski resort for some fun in the snow, but when Ben runs into the Weatherheads yet again, this time they are a force to reckon with, now that Kevin 11 has used his Bootleg powers to unlock their emotional controls!

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: A wish seems to ask Ruby and the others to take revenge into their hands. Mina stands her ground and refuses. Will Ruby learn something from this?

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off on their heroic quest and, almost immediately, a winged serpent steals their map to Eagle Mountain.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: A fire-breathing Giant Chicken is destroying the local farmers' prize vegetables. Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the Giant Chicken, but... gets captured by her instead.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: When Prince Ivandoe valiantly sets free Brian the Bard, he discovers he is now stuck with him... until such time that Brian saves Prince Ivandoe's life in return.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: In an effort to impress Jezebel the thiefstress, Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off to find the elusive Centicore.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the turnip thief... the very worst type of thief!

programme.desc: Monroe must compete in a dog show to help June catch a shapeshifting creature on the loose.

programme.desc: The Sandman puts the entire school in danger during the night of the big dance.

programme.title: Hitman 2
programme.desc: Jun is serializing a new season of webtoon. He receives an e-mail with great storyline thus draws according to it. Terrorism similar to the story occurs and Jun is being suspected...

programme.title: Holy Night: Demon Hunters
programme.desc: Seoul falls into chaos as a devil-worshipping cult summons an ancient demon Asmodeus. “Holy Night”, the demon-hunting trio, unleash their power to battle against the cult enforcers and the demon in order to save a possessed girl from Asmodeus.

programme.title: Where Would You Like to Go?
programme.desc: A tragic accident claims the lives of a teacher. His widow seeks solace in a trip to Warsaw, where an unexpected reunion and a letter bring hope to her journey of healing and rediscovery.

programme.title: Bear Man
programme.desc: Two bears from the Institute of techonolgy have turned into humans after eating garlic and mugwort. Yet, one has grown up into a police, while one has become a gangster...

programme.title: Killing Romance
programme.desc: As a popular actress has growing discontentment towards her marriage, she begins planning to kill her rich husband with her neighbor.

programme.title: Waiting for Rain
programme.desc: An unmotivated student regains his passion for life after exchanging letters with his childhood friend and promise to meet if it rains on December 31st each year.

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin is the newly appointed manager of a girls' volleyball team which is going to disband. The new owner sold all ace players for money and asked the team to win at least once.

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Kang-jin is bullied as the lowest-ranking boy at school with no presence and money. He starts a business on private loans by chance and soon rises to the top of the school hierarchy.

programme.title: The Noisy Mansion
programme.desc: Geo-ul moves into the mysterious apartment plagued by unexplained floor noise. Determined to solve the mystery, she faces unexpected challenges while uncovering the apartment's secrets.

programme.title: Room No. 7
programme.desc: Doo-Sik tries to evade bankruptcy by selling his DVD screening business, but a crisis arises as he discovers a corpse and a stash of drugs that belongs to his employee in screening room number seven.

programme.title: The Housemaid
programme.desc: Eun-yi is hired as a nanny in an lavish mansion by businessman Hoon and his pregnant wife, Hae-ra. When Eun-yi is seduced by the father of the house, she becomes the unwitting victim in a series of traps laid by the women of the house. Eun-yi must now outwit and escape the vicious family to protect her sanity and her life.

programme.title: Innocence
programme.desc: A hotshot lawyer uncovers the conspiracy of a small village while defending her estranged mother, who has Alzheimer's disease and accused of killing the attendees at her husband’s funeral.

programme.title: Mr. Zoo: The Missing Vip
programme.desc: After discovering he can suddenly talk to animals, an intelligence agent partners with a canine pal to handle a case that has gone sideways.

programme.title: The Whispering
programme.desc: A woman and her boyfriend are among a group of students who are on a trip to celebrate their graduation. They wander into an abandoned amusement park and discover the "House of Horrors".

programme.title: Once Again
programme.desc: Woo-seok in his 40's has always dreamt of going back to his high school days when he had the best days of his life. After an accident, he wakes up and finds himself in the year 1997...

programme.title: The Sheriff in Town
programme.desc: When a former police investigator from Busan suspects something off about a slick businessman from Seoul, the “sheriff” resolves to track his every move in order to keep his town safe.

programme.title: Toss Coin
programme.desc: A busker met a girl who makes decision through tossing a coin.

programme.title: Toss Coin: Behind the Scenes
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of "Toss Coin".

programme.title: Ordinary Person
programme.desc: Sung-jin is a police officer involved in a conspiracy after he arrested a suspected murderer by chance. Gyu-nam make use of Sung-jin's weakness, his family, to strike a deal with him.

programme.title: The King's Letters
programme.desc: King Sejong desires to create an original alphabet for his people. With the help of others, they struggle to create the Korean alphabet Hangul.

programme.desc: An arms dealer kidnapped two Koreans in Bangkok where the hostages were in fact held in an abandoned children's home in South Korea, when the kidnapper's motivations becomes clearer.

programme.title: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: A housekeeper is charged with murder. Her attorney is surprised to learn the only witness to the crime is a teenage girl with Asperger's. Will the girl be able to provide a valid statement?

programme.title: Hear Me: Our Summer
programme.desc: Yong-jun is working as a delivery man when he meets and instantly falls for Yeo-reum, the devoted sister of a gifter deaf swimmer. Yeo-reum slowly opens her heart to warm-hearted Yong-jun.

programme.title: The Spies
programme.desc: Kim, a North Korean spy who had lived in South Korea for 22 years is suddenly contacted by his superior. His team plans to complete an earlier mission and steal the target's large stockpile of cash.

programme.title: The Odd Family: Zombie on Sale
programme.desc: When a pharmaceutical company's illegal experiments inadvertently create a zombie, the quirky Park family discovers an interesting side effect to the virus and tries to profit from it.

programme.title: Boy in the Pool
programme.desc: Seok-young bumps into Woo-ju and they get closer after Woo-ju saves her from drowning. They lost touch after Woo-ju moves to Seoul to be a swimmer. Will they be able to meet again?

programme.title: It's Okay
programme.desc: The movie follows In-yong, an ever-optimistic girl who loses her mother in a car accident, struggles to stay strong on her own. As she is kicked out because of her overdue rent, she finds support from her teacher, her classmate and a pharmacist friend to overcome hardship.

programme.title: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: An evil spirit that changes faces infiltrates a family, placing one brother in danger while the other tries to save him.

programme.title: Office
programme.desc: The investigation following a sales manager brutally killing his entire family leads to a track of mystery and tragedy in an overwhelmed work team at Seoul.

programme.title: The World of the Married Ep8
programme.desc: Ji Sun-woo, a successful doctor, is married to Lee Tae-oh, an aspiring filmmaker. Their marriage, however, starts to fall apart when Lee engages in an extra-marital affair.

programme.title: Prison Chaos
programme.desc: Prison is a hell where only the strong survive. Under Hwang's reign, the peace in prison can be maintained. The newcomer Han breaks the peace and reveals the hidden secrets there...

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail. Tag helps train him (and his tail), and they even track down Master Wag who gives Scooch a good luck charm. But when Scooch loses the good luck charm before his tail-kwondo test, he needs to find a way to believe in himself.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Mr. Tanaka is moving places all by himself, so Team Zenko step in to assist, and learn the importance of asking people for help. / When Sam's skateboard competition falls on the same day as her favourite creator Ken KaBlam's comic book signing, TZG secretly prevents him leaving town before she gets the chance to meet him.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple and Winger each injure a wing while they're with Dak, and only teamwork can get them home. At the roost, Cutter gets stuck in a puddle of goo.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders have a "Dragon Day" to show their skills to a young fan, but Aggro skips it to hang out with her new fun -- but reckless -- friends.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody's non-talking dog parents arrive for an unexpected visit; Galileo makes the world go dark when he crashes his spaceship and breaks the sun.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman's scout troop, the Laser Robot Tiger Troopers, earn their merit badges on the show; Mark Twain's gift for gab wins back his lucky typewriter.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Artephius tries to warn the town when an evil mouse charms his way into San Lorenzo – but no one will listen to him.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Cleevil, an orphan goblin, seeks refuge in San Lorenzo – but, unbeknownst to Puss, he is in cahoots with the Duchess.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: Jindiao takes Po and the kids hostage in an attempt to locate the Wellspring

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: The kids are desperate to get back and help their fellow Panda Villagers, and Po decides he must figure out a way to defeat Jindiao before he controls the world

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky and Bebe spend the weekend pretending to be besties when their fathers come for a family visit and reveal that they're old friends.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: As a new term begins, Maricela and her horse, Mystery, arrive at the academy to join Lucky, Pru and Abigail for the school year.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the dragon riders foster displaced Hidden Realm dragons in Rakke Town but things get complicated when Mr. Rakke makes a surprise visit.

programme.desc: The Dragon riders enlist the aid of Carla and Hazel and their scientific knowledge to help them prepare for a mission to neutralize Jörmungandr so they can return him to his chamber and seal him back inside.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must rescue Plowhorn from Sledkin when the villain abducts the dragon to help her find the Gods Realm and the Dragonsite jewel.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Despite being terrible at the job, Krupp wants to be the camp director again next summer. That's something Harold and George simply cannot abide.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: It's parents' weekend at Lake Summer Camp, and Krupp's eager to make amends with Harold and George ... or so he says.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold want Cash Networth to buy the camp and fire Krupp. But before he'll agree to pony up the dough, Cash has a small request of his own.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug thinks his forehead looks too big in Ugga's family portrait, she strives to make the painting disappear.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When the adults exclude the kids from their adult-only cave, the kids make their own much cooler cave, soon making the adults want to switch caves.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When a freak lightning strike turns Thunk into a genius, Phil is thrilled to have someone likeminded on the farm, until the farm residents start asking Thunk for help with problems on the farm instead of him.

programme.title: DRAGONS 9 REALMS S2
programme.desc: Tom and the dragon riders foster displaced Hidden Realm dragons in Rakke Town but things get complicated when Mr. Rakke makes a surprise visit.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Our team’s startup company and their rivals at Baby Corp get in a “Space Race”, competing to see who can make the cutest kiddie-pretend “moon landing” for a baby – a spectacle sure to bring in a bounty of Baby Love. With both companies pouring their resources into a simulated space take off, tempers and sabotage are running hot, and the scrappy little startup is in danger of getting crushed by their big business competitor.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: JJ reluctantly lets Tina take over her assistant duties for the day, but a Tina slip-up leads to an outbreak of town adults drinking diluted special formula that makes them all baby-brained. When JJ discovers this, she works with R & D Baby Simmons and Security Baby Katja to antidote the wobbling “Adult Babies” before Tina can find out and blame herself.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina’s startup company for exploding baby Iggy’s favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When unexpected guests arrive bringing AAARRRGGHHs past and illness to light Jim finds himself competing in a terrifying game of Pyrobligst.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim and Strickler team up to bring down Angor Rot Meanwhile the Gnome returns with important information regarding Baby Enrique.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim must convince Strickler to cut the bond to his mom while Claire and Toby sneak into his office during the Spring Fling Dance for the incantation.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando – and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With their parents nearly regenerated and Morando in pursuit of Gaylen’s Core, Aja, Krel, and Vex unite with Toby and Arrgh on a quest into the depths of Trollmarket to unearth the relic before it ends up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Armed with the power of Gaylen's Core, Morando's forces attack Arcadia as the Royals fight to protect their lives and their adopted Earth home.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom that goes from newborn to full-grown in one day. Gabby and Pandy have to take care of the whiny and fussy growing Itty Bitty Blossom and make sure it is in its permanent soil spot before it's fully grown.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy help out at all the different stores (Cakey's Bakery, Baby Box's Craft Emporium, Kitty Fairy's Flower Shoppe) to earn kitty coins and save up for a melodicat at the Grand Opening of DJ Catnip’s Music Store!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes two little containers of popcorn and two movie tickets, it’s movie night in the dollhouse! Demanding Director CatRat leads the Gabby Cats through a Gabby-fied version of a classic story, Gabby-locks and the Three Bears.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

But Boss and Tina struggle to stay on the same page after Tina admits that she might, kinda, sorta be thinking about retiring as a regular baby.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After Crispin Biscuits changes the Baby Love economy to reward companies for bringing in baby hate, Boss Baby is forced to make himself the most hated baby in town to save their startup company. Meanwhile, Tina needs to end Crispin Biscuits’ attacks on their company before she can finally hang up her boss role and retire to a life of cuddle time with daddy and mommy.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Toby gets secret transmissions through his headgear and his friends decide they need to infiltrate; meanwhile, Jim forms an unlikely alliance

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom and Dad Templeton do the unthinkable: leave Boss Baby and Tim under the authority of a babysitter!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom tries to help Tim get over his fear of the neighborhood crazy-cat-lady

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: The crew uses Lightning Bitbugs to light up the garage when Dozer needs a late-night repair, but need a new plan after Scrapadactyls attack.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When tar fills the cracks of the crater, the Dinotrux must find a way to herd the free-roaming Rollodons to help smooth over the sticky situation.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The snails are invited to perform on a cruise ship and while onboard Turbo encounters a group of rodent pirates who challenge him to a race—loser has to walk the plank/When Turbo is knocked out before a big charity race, Skidmark creates a shell that allows the crew to race the unconscious Turbo with a remote control.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The snails accidentally wake a group of cicadas from their hibernation and after the bugs begin eating the town's food supply the snails go to extreme measures to rid the city of the /A celebrity chef steals Tito's taco recipe and challenges the FAST crew to a relay race against his own group of copycat racing snails.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Merry Scary Christmas It's Christmas and Casper wants to spend the holiday with his human pal, Jimmy. Time Waits for No Ghost When Casper discovers a clock that can stop time, everyone wants to use it for his or her own purpose.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Ghostbust a Move When Jimmy's dad decides to move the family away from Deedstown, Casper and his friends vow to stop Mr. Bradley from selling their house. My Fair Harpy The Winter Chill Dance is coming up and Ra is determined to be king.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! However, while decorating for MerCat's favorite day of the year, MerCat accidentally loses her color and sparkle. Gabby and Pandy must help her get her sparkle back for the big Spa Day party!

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the Dews' Glitter Guide, Willow comes to check on the Dews’ progress, they feel like they’re failing to impress her, until Lola gets locked out of the apartment during a game of Hide-and-Seek and Dews work together to get her back inside. / When the Dew Drops discover a time capsule in the park, they set out to find the mystery owner.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe convinces the Tooth Fairy to visit before Marcus has actually lost his tooth, the Dew Drops do everything in their power to make sure the tooth is out before she arrives! / The Dews decide to hold a concert in the park for their animal friends, but can’t find the time to practice.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy help out at all the different stores (Cakey's Bakery, Baby Box's Craft Emporium, Kitty Fairy's Flower Shoppe) to earn kitty coins and save up for a melodicat at the Grand Opening of DJ Catnip’s Music Store!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year’s Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he’s determined to stay up with the big kids and join the fun. But as the night goes on, an exhausted Melman causes total chaos for himself and the gang. He ultimately realizes that missing your bedtime isn’t all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Winners and Sinners
programme.desc: Five parolees swear they will reform, while an underworld boss decides to reactivate his counterfeit money business

programme.title: Bleeding Heart
programme.desc: A yoga instructor looks to protect her sex-worker sister from her deadbeat boyfriend.

programme.title: Iron Monkey
programme.desc: A martial artist/doctor steals from the corrupt authorities as a masked thief to give to the poor while another martial artist/doctor is forced to hunt him down.

programme.title: Ashfall
programme.desc: When the stagnant volcano on Baekdu suddenly erupts, A group from across the Korean peninsula was formed to prevent another eruption that may destroy the whole Korea

programme.title: Kiss and Spell
programme.desc: When a ghost-fearing magician falls for his staffer, who happens to be haunted by her dead best friend, he must face his fears while convincing her he'd make an excellent boyfriend.

programme.title: The Young Master
programme.desc: After failing in a Lion Dance competition, Dragon is sent away from school to find his errant brother.

programme.title: Tully
programme.desc: A struggling mother of three forms an unexpected bond with the night nanny hired to help with her newborn baby.

programme.title: Brick Mansions
programme.desc: An undercover Detroit cop navigates a dangerous neighborhood that's surrounded by a containment wall with the help of an ex-con in order to bring down a crime lord and his plot to devastate the entire city.

programme.title: The Roundup: No Way Out
programme.desc: Seven years after the roundup in Vietnam, Ma Seok-do joins a new squad to investigate a murder case. He soon starts to dig deeper when he finds out the case involves a synthetic drug and a gang of thugs.

programme.title: Tiger on Beat
programme.desc: A drug dealer joins forces with two mismatched cops to crack a band of heroin dealers.

programme.title: Howl
programme.desc: When passengers on a train are attacked by a creature, they must band together in order to survive until morning.

programme.title: Glorious Days
programme.desc: A group of five girls and one boy becomes Highschool best friends since high school. 23 years later, one of them lay dying in a hospital. She hopes she could see all five of her old friends for the last time.

programme.title: Twinkle, Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective on assignment in Japan gets help from his old gang to rescue his captive partner.

programme.title: Dragon Fist
programme.desc: A dishonored student of the Dragon Fist Sect seeks revenge for the death of his teacher.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: Three Midwestern brothers, a crime lord, and an incorruptible cop are on a deadly collision course when the youngest brother's fiancée is kidnapped by human traffickers.

programme.title: Hellboy: Rise of the Blood Queen
programme.desc: Hellboy, a supernatural being, protects the earth with the Bureau of Paranormal Research and Defense. Soon, he faces the blood queen, an ancient witch who wants to bring about the end of the world

programme.title: One True Loves
programme.desc: A woman is unexpectedly forced to choose between the husband she has long thought dead and the fiance who has finally brought her back to life.

programme.title: Legendary Amazons
programme.desc: In early 11th century China, the Song Dynasty is being invaded by armies of the rival state Western Xia. Yang, the last of a long line of Song generals, is killed and his widowed wife Mu leads other widows into battle to save their dynasty.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Extremely silly comedy about a self-indulgent private investigator who winds up on a cruise ship full of rich patrons, gorgeous women, murderous terrorists, and scarce food

programme.title: The Closet
programme.desc: A recent widower tries to start over in a new home that takes a chilling turn when his daughter goes missing and a mysterious exorcisttells him to look for her in the closet.

programme.title: Armour of God
programme.desc: A treasure hunter and his bumbling sidekick are sent on a quest through Europe to find a mysterious treasure held by a shadowy organization of monks

programme.title: Tower of Death
programme.desc: After his brother is killed while hunting the murderers of a friend, a young man seeks to bring the perpetrators to justice.

programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: In a city rife with injustice, an ex-cop seeks redemption and revenge after being double-crossed and then framed by its most powerful figure

programme.title: Monsters: Dark Continent
programme.desc: Ten years on from the events of Monsters, and the 'Infected Zones' have now spread worldwide. The Army decide to draft in more numbers to help deal with this insurgency.

programme.title: The Roundup: No Way Out
programme.desc: Seven years after the roundup in Vietnam, Ma Seok-do joins a new squad to investigate a murder case. He soon starts to dig deeper when he finds out the case involves a synthetic drug and a gang of thugs.

programme.title: Remember
programme.desc: The story of Pil-Joo, an Alzheimer's patient in his 80s, who lost all his family during the Japanese colonial era, and devotes his lifelong revenge before his memories disappear, and a young man in his 20s who helps him.

programme.title: In the Line of Duty 4
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop and two American cops are onto a suspected harbor worker and are forced to team up when they discover that the suspect is a witness on the run from the CIA

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil
programme.desc: An assassin goes to Thailand in order to solve a kidnapping case and finds himself chased by a man whose sibling he killed.

programme.title: Love Reset
programme.desc: A married couple who received a divorce settlement lose their memories in an accident. With amnesia, they fall in love again, so their families try to restore their memories to finalize the divorce.

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: A former US Federal Agent must abandon the witness protection program and come out of hiding when his London home is invaded in error due to a wrong address.

programme.title: Stellar: A Magical Ride
programme.desc: Park Young-bae must find his best friend, Dong-sik, who stole the $300,000 sports car to pay off debts, before the boss and his gang decides Young-bae is better off dead.

programme.title: Exeter
programme.desc: During a party in an abandoned asylum, teenagers perform an occult ritual that leads to a violent possession

programme.title: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: American Ranger John Cutter seeks revenge against the notorious Ukrainian arms dealer responsible for his demise.

programme.title: Kill Chain
programme.desc: A deadly shootout between two hitmen erupts into an evening of murder, betrayal and revenge amongst a gang of crooked police, assassins and mercenaries.

programme.title: Cz12
programme.desc: A man searches the world for a set of mystic artifacts. The twelve bronze heads of the animals from the Chinese zodiac.

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: A musical drama about a wife who asks her husband to help her find her childhood sweetheart as a birthday present. Though reluctant, her husband's only choice is to set out on this journey with her.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail. Tag helps train him (and his tail), and they even track down Master Wag who gives Scooch a good luck charm. But when Scooch loses the good luck charm before his tail-kwondo test, he needs to find a way to believe in himself.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! However, while decorating for MerCat's favorite day of the year, MerCat accidentally loses her color and sparkle. Gabby and Pandy must help her get her sparkle back for the big Spa Day party!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom that goes from newborn to full-grown in one day. Gabby and Pandy have to take care of the whiny and fussy growing Itty Bitty Blossom and make sure it is in its permanent soil spot before it's fully grown.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The habitat is celebrating “Sloth Day” in honor of its newest arrival: cool, chill, Lucia the sloth, who just arrived from Costa Rica! At first, the gang is excited to have a new friend, but soon the whole zoo develops sloth fever; everywhere they go, people are walking around in sloth masks-- even Kate is fawning over her! Melman, accustomed to getting lots of attention as the baby of the group, worries that Kate loving Lucia will mean less love and attention for him! When Lucia overhears Melman lament that there’s not enough room in the habitat for another animal, she decides to strike out and go someplace where she is welcome. Realizing the error of his unwelcoming ways, Melman and the gang must try to win Lucia back and bring her back to the habitat before Kate (and the rest of the city) notices she’s gone!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: With a new family moving to town, Mayor Sniffington wants Pawston to look perfect. Tag and Scooch offer to help, but it's too many chores to do on their own, so Tag builds a robot to help. But when Frank and Beans catch wind of the robot, they try to swipe it so that it will do their personal chores. \ When Tag learns that Pawston's new fire chief is a cat, she leads a welcoming effort with the dogs of Pawston. But when their attempts to welcome Tom and Kit Whiskerton go awry, Tag realizes it's because they're only doing things that dogs would enjoy.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch get a once-in-a-lifetime chance to learn magic from Muttfield, Tag cannot wait to be the star of the end-of-class show. When Scooch outshines Tag with his natural gift for magic, Tag gets jealous and attempts a master level trick that goes awry. \ The dogs are shedding their winter coats and it's the day of the big Pawston Picnic. But when Spike alerts the Barkers that there's an incoming windstorm, it's up to Spike and Tag chase the storm while the Barkers try to convince the dogs of Pawston to go inside!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.desc: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he’d want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

programme.desc: Nick's train leaves from Tangier and it's a special one; Al Boraq, which speeds along the high-speed line making its way down the west coast. programme.desc: Josh Gates explores American history, including a shocking theory about John Wilkes Booth, and myth-busting truths behind Paul Revere's midnight ride.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: In Trinidad, Heather and Phil investigate claims of demonic possession and Obeah curses, tracing the sinister forces locals say still grip the island.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures (S13)
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to beautiful Ogden, Utah, to help a family plagued by a demonic figure.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S5)
programme.desc: Marooned on a barren island under the tropical sun, Matt and Joe risk a long swim through shark-infested waters and fight for life-sustaining basics at every turn.

programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

Noona, You Are A Woman To Me 2
programme.desc: Does age really matter when it comes to love? This dating reality series follows older women and younger men as they move beyond the real-world barriers of age differences in search of true love. The moment they cross the line, a new kind of older-woman–younger-man romance begins—setting a fresh standard for modern dating reality shows.

programme.title: Young Lady and Gentleman
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: Young Lady and Gentleman
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: The Return of Superman
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of "Superman" , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Recipe for Love

programme.desc: KBS World Daily English News Anchor : Choi Kyu-yeon

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: Round Playlist
programme.desc: The program is intended to promote exchanges between Korea and ASEAN countries by utilizing popular music.

programme.title: Music Bank
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Lovely Horribly
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.title: Lovely Horribly
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: 2026 Battle Lineup XI in Gwangju
programme.desc: The 11th edition of Asia's largest street dance battle competition.

programme.title: Got The Spot
programme.desc: This program highlights locations that are truly exceptional, blending traditional elements with modern trends. Through the eyes of foreign influencers who thrive on social media, we aim to showcase the unique charm of different regions and generate a wealth of engaging content in this groundbreaking travel initiative!

programme.title: Got The Spot
programme.desc: This program highlights locations that are truly exceptional, blending traditional elements with modern trends. programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society’s conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: I Am Rage
programme.desc: Erin, a troubled young woman with trauma and anger, travels to a remote estate to meet her boyfriend’s family. The visit turns into a nightmare when she discovers they are part of a blood cult. Abducted and marked for harvest, Erin unleashes a deadly rage, turning the hunt into a brutal fight for survival.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter’s company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Martial arts master Liang Kun withdraws from the jianghu to protect the woman he loves, but his absence leads to her tragic death. Realising he can no longer escape his fate, he returns to the martial world. With the help of beggar clan leader Su Can, Liang Kun fights his way through ruthless enemies to avenge her.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: In the first elimination round of the competition, twenty-three cooks will show the judges a window into their home life through a favourite dish that they like to cook for their loved ones.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael honours her beloved grandfather by making his recipe for stuffed artichokes. She also prepares Roman-style artichokes, infused with fresh herbs and garlic and then sautéed in oil.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a well-rounded meal of a French-cut rack of lamb, baked with Dijon mustard and seasoned breadcrumbs, and a side dish of brown and wild rice with porcini mushrooms and sautéed spinach.

programme.title: The Ice Rink Murders
programme.desc: After time away from the ice, elite figure skater Megan returns to training, only to find that a killer targeting skaters is giving a whole new meaning to the phrase "cut-throat competition."

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: In the first elimination round of the competition, twenty-three cooks will show the judges a window into their home life through a favourite dish that they like to cook for their loved ones.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Laura and Brandon have always wanted to live by the ocean and give their children the nautical life. After a major bathroom flood forces them to move, they decide it's time to make the leap.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: Ambitious flipper Leka finds a promising zombie house but lacks the funds to make it happen. Expert flipper James Dainard is intrigued yet sceptical due to the house's poor kerb appeal and choppy layout.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy take on a recently raided, abandoned house, now up for sale at a very low price. A real hot mess, this eyesore is currently a raccoon den with a sagging roof and holes in the walls.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: On a friendship trip to Thailand with real friends, the "Dokbakz" gather to celebrate. Their joy is short-lived, as they decide to pick the one who will shoulder the cost of the accommodation.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Six charismatic rookie actors gather under one roof for a groundbreaking residency audition. Age, experience and style all differ, but they share one goal: to become the male lead of a romantic drama.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: Veronica has a huge mango-sized growth on her back that has taken away her zest for life and desire for camping. Dr. Lyndsey returns to help Dr. Lee shape former golf pro Ken's lumpy, bumpy nose.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S18)
programme.desc: The cooks are excited to discover the Invention Test. In 75 minutes, they must take a pantry staple and turn it into something extraordinary. The bottom five will face an elimination cook-off tomorrow.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a smothered chicken gizzard poutine, which mixes traditional, Southern-fried chicken gizzards with French-Canadian fries, gravy and cheese curds for a decadent global meal.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: Ruth and her husband Ed's tranquil life in Wichita, Kansas is suddenly turned upside down when Ed suffers a heart attack. While Ed is in the hospital, Ruth's starts to receive mysterious threats.

programme.desc: Rebecca, Kristy and Roy have found their next potential flip: a lakefront property with a spicy past. Weather-beaten and dated, this former vacation home is definitely lacklustre.

programme.desc: Does riverside view mean that little stream over there…?" What’s the shocking truth about their first-day accommodation that left the Dokbakz crew furious?

programme.desc: The first mission begins: the actors must create their own characters and dialogue to portray the beginning of a romance. Judging the audition are acclaimed director Yoon Jong-ho and writer Kim Jae-hwan.

programme.desc: In an ideal neighborhood, a ramshackle bungalow with some vandalism and a faulty foundation falls in Derek and Chauncey's laps. A friend of theirs needs help with a flip and only has two weeks.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most infamous crimes in American history: the gruesome murder of a young beauty, unsolved for decades. There's a long line of suspects, each more mysterious than the next.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies and Japan clash in the jungles and plains of Asia, the 'forgotten theater' of World War II, as America struggles to bring the fight to Tokyo’s door.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Harvey Firestone races to innovation against a crosstown rival as they both bet big on bringing car tyres to the nation. As sworn enemies, they’ll create two of the most famous brand names in America.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil’s Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history’s darkest stories.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Thanks to the industry-defining innovations of three men through the creation of games like Super Mario and Pokémon, Nintendo goes from a struggling playing card company to a video game juggernaut.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies and Japan clash in the jungles and plains of Asia, the 'forgotten theater' of World War II, as America struggles to bring the fight to Tokyo’s door.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil’s Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history’s darkest stories.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most infamous crimes in American history: the gruesome murder of a young beauty, unsolved for decades. There's a long line of suspects, each more mysterious than the next.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: These stories take survival to the extreme. Like fending off a black bear while dangling off a cliff. Or drifting through shark-infested waters with nothing but a pair of rubber boots to stay afloat.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: From the strict codes of Hammurabi to the secretly malevolent evil eye, history is full of acts committed in the name of revenge. We uncover the forces that have driven individuals to seek vengeance.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick and Corey race to San Diego to take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie Grease. Is the flaming hot rod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: Robbie and Jersey go wild for Edd's classic car collection, but he's reluctant to let anything go. Mike has a brush with country music stardom as he combs through the belongings of Hank Williams Jr.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way
programme.desc: Come along for a feast as Chris explores the secrets behind the famous Taiwanese street banquet Bando. Venturing behind the scenes, Chris is stunned by the seamless efficiency of the all-female Bando team.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way
programme.desc: With competition at an all-time high, Chris embarks on a boba-tastic journey to meet experts and discover what it takes to stand out in the bubble tea industry. He starts by sampling classic bubble teas.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, an underestimated confectioner creates the first wrapped penny candy—the Tootsie Roll. Meanwhile, an unemployed salesman transforms medicinal hard candy into a multipack.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: Jaime meets the Finest Female surfer in the Philippines, the Queen of Cloud 9, Nildie Rietenbach. Can she conquer the waves after a single lesson?

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: While Jaime heads for Puerto Princesa Underground River through a mangrove swamp, she is offered a local snack – a shipworm from a rotting log.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S1)
programme.desc: We explore some of the most valuable treasures found in the most unlikely of ways. Like an Ancient Roman mosaic hiding in an apartment, or a valuable piece of Americana tucked away in a flea market.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: An Aztec king's treasure vanishes into thin air, inspiring a 500-year search that spans continents. One of the greatest warriors of all time amassed a vast horde, but its whereabouts remains a mystery.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: As the tide begins to turn against the Axis powers, the leaders of Germany and Japan deploy opposite strategies on their home fronts.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: Resistance to Nazi occupation and oppression is a constant throughout the war, with results both triumphant and devastating.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII
programme.desc: Racing an incoming hurricane, Darrell Miklos and his team are forced to make tough choices. But after a season-long search, they locate the source of the massive magnetometer hit recorded at Target 4.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team has secret intel on a wreck that might be a legendary 1930s disappearance: the champion racing yacht known as Ingomar. Lured by a light, the Ingomar's seasoned crew smashes into an obstacle.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14)
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle hunt the deepest waters of the swamp. Ronnie wrestles a cannibal gator that's destroying his chances to move up in the rankings. Leron and Porkchop go after monsters.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: We journey deep into the rugged geography of this legendary Indonesian island and come face to face with a cannibalistic tribe - the Bataks.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: Remarkable feats of engineering from our ancient past span the globe. Some are amazing in size. Others in sophistication. Some are so strange they border on inexplicable.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As pressure mounts in the swamp, Troy and Pickle risk their lives in the oil fields. Joey and Zak attempt to knock Mr Daniel off his throne, but the Edgar Patriarch refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Sometimes the strangest things on Earth are happening just below its surface. These are the weird and wondrous tales of the sea beasts, hidden cities, and impossible creatures that lurk beneath us.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: As new research identifies who may have been behind the Oak Island mystery, the Laginas and their team are stunned by what they find in the Money Pit area.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: During World War II, the Nazis created specialised Death Camps for killing prisoners. At Sobibor, a group of Jews were forced to keep the camp operational, engineered a daring escape that saved many lives.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro begins the 1,000-mile Iditarod with his sixteen-dog team, pitted against harsh conditions and rugged terrain in one of the toughest races on earth. Bret and Ivy ascend into the Alaska Range.
