programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: As the police sets to arrest a drug lord, a team of masked thugs steals the drugs and murders the cops. Inspector Bong is devastated to see the aftermath of the carnage and soon discovers that the killers are led by Ngo, a former fellow cop who was forced into a life of crime by him. As the two men meet again, it is time to settle the score…

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: A heroic tale about Hong Kong's brave firefighters. These courageous men can march into disastrous firegrounds and risk their lives to save others. However, do they have the same courage to confront their personal issues?

programme.title: The Invincible Fist
programme.desc: A dedicated chief constable nicknamed “The Invincible Fist” is chasing after a band of bandits near a village one day and encounters an innocent blind girl. He quickly falls in love with her, but finds out she is the daughter of a vicious bandit. Will he kill the father of his lover?

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: A mysterious new gang, the Masked Avengers, is slaughtering the martial world's greatest heroes. To stop them, three fearless fighters must track down the gang's hidden lair in Jingyang Town and put an end to their reign of terror.

programme.title: Brothers Five
programme.desc: The five Kao brothers, separated since birth, are unaware that the master of Teng Lung Manor has killed their father. All five however, vow to defeat the vicious gangsters at the manor due to their bullying ways. After reuniting and with much discipline and hard work, the Kaos are prepared to face Lung and his gang.

programme.title: Lion VS Lion
programme.desc: The traditional lion dance has never looked so good as in Lion VS Lion which captures the most impressive sequences of lion dancing on film. Besides being loaded with enjoyable martial arts chicanery, film historians can revel because it's also the first film that clearly demonstrates the intricacies and differences between the traditional Northern and Southern lion dancing techniques. The Five Venom alumnus and Chang Cheh discovery, Lo Meng, teams up with Liu Chia-liang protege Wang Yu, as they inadvertently turn from vagabond kung-fu school operators into anti-Ching, patriotic fighters.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: Return of the Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: One of Shaw Studio’s highest grossing movies ever, this is the story of Li Chin Huan, the renowned, charming and sentimental swordsman who must fight many opponents, including an evil Clan Chief, for a place in the martial arts world.

programme.title: My Date With A Vampire
programme.desc: Demon slayer Ma Siu Ling crosses paths with a mysterious detective while probing bizarre supernatural cases. From initial distrust to allies, they join forces against an ancient threat looming over the city. As the blood moon rises, they must uncover secrets of their past lives to prevent a modern-day apocalypse.

programme.title: The Kid With A Tattoo
programme.desc: Young Bao Tong witnesses the brutal murder of his kung fu master by a vicious villain. A large eagle tattoo on Bao’s chest was spotted by the killer as he escapes. Can Bao escape from the killer?

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: This iconoclastic film retells the legend of seven Chinese patriots, who sacrificed their lives to defend against 20,000 Japanese soldiers and 50 tanks for 5 days, at a strategic key point of the Great Wall known as Pa Tou Lou Tzu.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?

programme.title: Life Gamble
programme.desc: Martial arts master Yu has retired for years but is invited to join force with another master Tao to fight against the four famous thieves and retrieve the stolen Dragon Jade. However, Tao’s real plan is to possess the treasure himself and kills Yu after he defeats the thieves...

programme.title: Last Suspect
programme.desc: Lawyer Chen receives a mysterious call demanding her to defend a murder suspect after her daughter is kidnapped, and is told that she can only save her daughter by winning the case. As she starts investigation with the police and evidence emerges, Chen discovers the truth and reveals the mastermind. Can she rescue her daughter in time?

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima works for a corrupt lord Qin who is suffering from a deadly disease that only a special herb can cure. Qin sends him on an urgent mission to retrieve it, but the task is made more difficult when Sima has to fight off other martial artists who want to steal the cure away from him. He has to fight with his ultimate weapon, the Dragon Missile!

programme.title: Social Distancing
programme.desc: Cherry is a young girl addicted to the internet. After seeing a warning video about an “e-ghost” on YouTube, she begins to encounter many mysterious incidents, and the “e-ghost” also takes control of her family. Cherry must face her unbearable past in order to get out of this horrifying paranormal world...

programme.title: We are Family
programme.desc: Struggling as an extra, Chi Kwong joins a rent-a-family company run by Carlos and aspiring actress Catherine, and rent themselves out as make-believe relatives. As they surrogate different families, they unravel the complexities of family relationships, forging deeper connections along the way.

programme.title: Atonement
programme.desc: Single father Lung and his daughter Ying mean the world to each other. A firm believer in karma, Lung has his faith shattered when Ying is abducted during a trip to Thailand. Years later, as he tries to start anew with a second marriage, his relentless search for her kidnappers descends into a dark and dangerous pursuit of vengeance.

programme.title: Heaven Sword and Dragon Sabre
programme.desc: In the Yuan Dynasty, martial artists everywhere battle for the Heaven Sword and the Dragon Sabre, as only when these two powerful weapons combine can a secret be revealed to help one become the king of the martial arts world. As Zhang Wu Ji acquires the skills from “Nine Yang Scriptures” by chance, he is also embroiled in this lengthy battle.

programme.title: The Bullet Vanishes
programme.desc: A series of murders at a munitions factory sparks fear of a “Phantom Bullet” that kills without a trace. Detective Song Dong Lu and sharpshooter Guo Zhui are tasked with solving the case. As they uncover layers of corruption and conspiracy, they are drawn into a deadly game where the truth is more dangerous than the bullets.

programme.title: Shaolin Rescuers
programme.desc: Hong Xi Guan of Shaolin is chased and wounded by a martial arts scum who took refuge in the Qing court. He is saved and healed by friends from the wet market and they hide Hong in a bean curd shop to protect him. However, Hong’s enemy finds him and ambushes him at the shop, hoping to capture Hong and all his friends.

programme.title: Judgement of an Assassin
programme.desc: An evil clan plans a discord so as to dominate the martial arts world. Their masked assassins massacre another clan and one of the assassins is arrested and brought to trial at a tribunal of all the clans. What judgement will they make and can they uncover the truth?

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Carefree drifters Meng Gang and Tie Hu discover their purpose after meeting the revolutionary leader, Wan Tai. With the help of Meng Gang’s girlfriend, they infiltrate a warlord camp to seize weapons for the revolutionary cause. Following a fierce battle, all three make the ultimate sacrifice, becoming the "Anonymous Heroes" of the revolution.

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: A titular gang of misfits come together to protect a patriotic general from a scheming usurper. To this end, the unlikely heroes act as the general’s escorts on a dangerous journey to a distant British consulate, beset by enemies and sinister Japanese interference along the way.

programme.title: Love in a Fallen City
programme.desc: Based on a novel of the same name by the famous novelist Eileen Chang and directed by the equally acclaimed director Ann Hui, this romance story depicts the challenging relationship between an introverted Shanghai divorcee and a cynical Malaysian playboy during the Japanese invasion of Hong Kong in the 1940s. Will the lovers be together in the end?

programme.title: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
programme.desc: Young Ai Nu is abducted and sold to the popular Four Seasons brothel run by the powerful and ruthless Madam Chun Yi. Ai Nu gets locked up in a dungeon due to her fiery attitude. Soon, a murder occurs within the brothel and a policeman must race against time to prevent a vicious revenge plot from reaching its blood-spattered conclusion.

programme.title: The Convict Killer
programme.desc: After spending fifteen years in prison on trumped-up charges for drug smuggling, the martial arts master Teng Piao embarks on a journey to take revenge on the person who sets him up - “Black Leopard”. Unfortunately for Piao, no one knows the real identity of “Black Leopard”, except that there is a black leopard tattoo on his chest.

programme.title: Martial Club
programme.desc: The young Wong Fei Hung and his friend Wang Yin Lin offend the young master of another rival school and the expert they hire, causing both martial arts schools to fight against each other. This is Director Liu Chia Liang’s masterpiece and one of the top ten highest grossing movies in 1981.

programme.title: Invincible Enforcer
programme.desc: A young man is at the wrong place at the wrong time. As he offends a police inspector, he is thrown into jail and even when released, the police goes after him until he has no choice but to become a real criminal. Only a kind and beautiful probation officer is on his side, but can she help him?

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Liu serves his triad society loyally and tries to live a respectable life, but over time his good intentions lead him to an all-out gang war with a startling conclusion.

programme.title: Clan Feuds
programme.desc: Tie Zhong Tang, the adopted son of the Great Banner Sect leader, is hunted by the sect’s rival for the secret to its hidden treasure. To uncover the truth, he journeys to an island seeking the “Empress of the Day”, only to find her dead. There, he unexpectedly meets the sect’s founder, the “Emperor of the Night”, who reveals that he is Tie’s biological father.

programme.title: No One Like Me
programme.desc: Yang Qian Huan, the third disciple of the Imperial Astronomer, was once a golden boy. However, since the birth of Xu Qi An, his glory has waned. His relentless pursuit cannot defy a merciless truth: all has been foretold. Yet rising from his downfall, Yang defiantly forges his own path, refusing to bow to fate.

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: An elderly landowner marries young Dai Nan to keep his inheritance away from his unscrupulous nephew before he dies. When Dai Nan brings along the deed to meet his other nephew, a series of amusing incidents happen with this “young” auntie, the nephew and his son. Kara Hui won Best Actress in the first Hong Kong Film Awards for her role as Dai Nan.

programme.title: Legend of the Bat
programme.desc: It is rumoured that people can buy anything they desire on the mysterious Island of Bats so long as they have money. The charismatic swordsman Chu Liu Xiang and his friend travel to the island to seek answers but realize they are not the only ones who want to unveil the mystery of this place.

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: Set in the Tang Dynasty, the 13 adopted sons of Sha Tuo King are all renowned as royal warriors. David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealously, leading to a gruesome family feud.

programme.title: Peg O' My Heart
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Dr. Man begins treating night-shift taxi driver Choi, who is afraid to sleep and can no longer distinguish dreams from reality. During therapy, Dr. Man becomes haunted by his own disturbing and perplexing dreams. Are these night terrors the result of repressed memories, or the price of uncovering the ghosts hidden in Choi’s past?

programme.title: Legendary Weapons of China
programme.desc: Lei Kung, the leader of the Boxer Clan in Yunnan, dissolves the clan to save his disciples before going into self-exile. The Clan sends various assassins to kill him but failed. They then assigned Kung’s brother Yong to find and kill Kung, leading to a battle between the two brothers.

programme.title: Fist to Fist
programme.desc: While tracking a powerful drug syndicate, narcotics officer He Guang Chen is ambushed by masked raiders and pushed to the brink. As the truth unfolds, he discovers the mastermind is his former police academy friend. Betrayal cuts deep as he faces a brutal choice between duty and loyalty in a relentless fight for justice.

programme.title: Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: After surviving the Heavenly Lightning Strike, the souls of Ne Zha and Ao Bing persist, but their mortal forms lie in ruins. Master Tai Yi seeks to restore them using the Seven-Colored Lotus, yet countless perils loom over the process. As enemies close in and fate hangs in the balance, can they reclaim their bodies and rewrite their destiny?

programme.title: Pursuit of Vengeance
programme.desc: Kung Fu legend Ti Lung stars in the action movie as Fu Xue Hong, embarking on a epic journey of revenge for his father.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: The Lychee Road
programme.desc: A single lychee sparks a Tang Dynasty “Mission Impossible”! Low-ranking official Li Shan De must deliver it a thousand miles in three days to satisfy a consort’s craving. Racing against time, he encounters obstacles and absurd demands, turning the journey into a satirical adventure filled with tension and unexpected twists.

programme.title: Bloody Parrot
programme.desc: A swordsman is suspected of being the thief of a treasure sent to Emperor. Through his investigation, he is led on to the trail of the supernatural “Bloody Parrot”. Poisonous things happen including a demonic possession, witches casting poison spells and disgusting autopsies. Then a dead constable turns into a vampire!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Chatroom Japan puts a spotlight on our diverse international community. We report on the issues, speak to those involved, and get a fresh look at what it's like to live in Japan.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Akita / Koike Kazuko (creative director) Nishimonai Bon Odori Festival has continued for over 700 years. Koike finds timeless beauty in the costumes, remade using beloved family kimono.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: We visit a factory in Kobe that has overcome multiple challenges to keep making tasty "ekiben" railway bento (boxed meals) of local delicacies like the famous "octopus trap" and self-heating sukiyaki.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Locals in Hagi, on a delta facing the Sea of Japan, have lived in harmony with its waters. Beautiful time-lapse footage captures people crossing rivers by boat and canals flowing into homes.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: Bosai
programme.desc: What does it take to survive a flood? Japan has developed survival skills for floods through experiences such as typhoons. Find out how to safely navigate flooded streets and escape sinking cars.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to mountain. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #29 I went to listen to a piano recital. / To explain why you went somewhere, replace "masu" of a verb, for example, "kikimasu" (to listen) with "ni ikimashita" (went to do something).

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: Culture Crossroads is a program themed around creating a multicultural society. It also offers tips on disaster preparedness.

programme.title: Hello!NHK World Japan
programme.desc: In March, NHK WORLD-JAPAN launched a new online hub for BOSAI-preparing for disaster. It has pages, apps and guides, in multiple languages. We also see programs about June's theme: Mount Fuji.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.desc: This program visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: BIZ Stream
programme.desc: This upbeat program combines business and economic news with in-depth feature stories that give you a closer look at the latest trends within Japan and around the world.

programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from ( ), Day ( ) of the Grand Sumo Tournament in ( ).

programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.desc: Direct and in-depth. Interviews exploring the minds and motivations of the leaders, visionaries, artists and entrepreneurs who are changing our world.

programme.title: Dive in Tokyo

programme.title: Smallville S2 5
programme.desc: Clark becomes concerned when a mysterious poet, Byron Moore (SEAN FARIS), leaves love notes for Lana at her parents' grave. Clark warns her to stay away from Byron, but she is intrigued.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 01
programme.desc: Gather 'round for a most hackful holiday celebration, as Brooke and Kevin demonstrate how to navigate any holiday office party like a pro Elf, and explain how the ball drop became a New Year's tradition.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 02
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke hack their way through the worst obstacles an airport has to offer, and viewers share their DIY solutions for whipping up cream. Plus, Brooke and Kevin find out how low prices can go if you're a "good guy."

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 16
programme.desc: At a cell phone store, Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix your tablet, and later, he makes a drink that's impossible to swallow. Plus, a dog owner loves that Michael has turned her pet into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 17
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 2
programme.desc: Take a ride on the dumb side! TruTV is counting down the 20 most moronic motorheads ever caught on tape. You'll see a car cut in half, a bumper-loving pig, and the snow plow driver who makes vehicles disappear. Along for the ride is our hilarious cast of comedians, including Rachel Feinstein, Kevin McCaffrey, Sean Donnelly, and Chris Fairbanks.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 9
programme.desc: Our buyers go head-to-head to score an item that appears to be a covered car. But when the tarp is pulled back, will the winner drive away with a pile of cash or a piece of trash? Then, the legality of a locker's contents is called into question, but Brandon and Lori take a leap of faith and are rattled by what they find. And later, Sean has saved the best for last as our buyers are given the rare opportunity to compete for unclaimed airline luggage. It's an auction of a different breed that ignites a cash spending frenzy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 09
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers (until a special guest crashes the party), they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Smallville S2 5
programme.desc: Clark becomes concerned when a mysterious poet, Byron Moore (SEAN FARIS), leaves love notes for Lana at her parents' grave. Clark warns her to stay away from Byron, but she is intrigued.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 3
programme.desc: Howard's nervous when NASA asks him to throw out the first pitch at a game. Also, Leonard & Penny try to prove Sheldon wrong after he claims that he & Amy are a superior couple.

programme.title: Friends S7 6
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe compete to be Monica's maid of honor--but Monica doesn't want to make the decision. Phoebe eventually allows Rachel to fulfill the duty. Chandler tries to apologize to a girlfriend from his youth.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 1
programme.desc: Police takedowns can be risky business when criminals are armed and dangerous. That's why officers rely on non-lethal tactics like tasers, bean bag rounds and K-9 units to subdue suspects.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 2
programme.desc: Watch semi-trucks wreak havoc on roadways, criminals flee cops in pursuit, and crashes, collisions and cars flying through the air -- a dashboard camera can capture it all.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 4
programme.desc: Raj's honesty about his past comes back to bite him after his girlfriend, Emily, gives Penny the cold shoulder. Meanwhile, the guys consider becoming part-owners in Stuart's comic-book store.

programme.title: Friends S7 7
programme.desc: Ross discovers that his dissertation is in a section of the library where students go to have sex.Chandler's ex-girlfriend Janice manipulates Monica and Chandler into inviting her the wedding.Rachel and Phoebe meddle in Joey's relationship with Erin.

programme.title: Titans S1 3
programme.desc: Rachel and Kory travel to the convent where Rachel was raised, while Dick compares his own orphan experience to Rachel's; Rachel befriends Gar Logan.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. When his wife and child meet a grisly end at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge. Written by Cole Matthews

programme.title: East of Eden
programme.desc: Hollywood legend James Dean stars in this adaptation of John Steinbeck's classic novel East of Eden. Teenaged Cal Trask (Dean--Rebel Without a Cause, Giant) longs for the affection that his father reserves for his brother Aron, but his efforts meet only rejection. Also attracted to Aron's girlfriend, Cal becomes so frustrated in his search for love and acceptance that he reveals a long-held secret about their mother to Aron . . . knowledge that now tears the family apart.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 1
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure that leaves both their jaws on the floor, and then at a party store, Michael reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 2
programme.desc: At a library, Michael shocks people with every trick in the book, including a voice-controlled page-turner and outfit changes that almost get him recognized! And later, Michael amazes a trainee with a weightless mattress!

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 3
programme.desc: Security cameras in front yards, backyards and street corners capture crimes, mishaps and earth-shattering moments like break-ins and hit-and-runs. It's up to local law enforcement to save the day.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 4
programme.desc: Whether a crook on trial takes flight or an inmate gets cozy with a corrections officer, handcuffs and prison walls are no match for rebellious convicts who make last-ditch efforts to break free.

programme.title: Smallville S2 6
programme.desc: Because the farm is in financial trouble, Martha asks her estranged father, William Clark (GEORGE COE), for help.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 03
programme.desc: Skip a trip to the spa with a facial hack you can find in any schoolkid's book bag, and learn how to treat yourself like it's your birthday - any day of the year. Plus, Brooke and Kevin go for a swim… in a garbage bag.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 04
programme.desc: Señor Solución discovers a hack that gets him back in the mood, and Kevin and Brooke reveal fan hacks for cooling down a hot bed. Plus, get revenge on rigged arcades with hacks to make the claw machine cough up a sweet prize.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 10
programme.desc: A covered car lures our buyers to bid big, but the reveal could be more than the winner bargained for. Then, as the temperature climbs to the hottest day of the year, Jesse loses out to Dan on a locker full of expensive tools. But just when it lookslike Jesse is out of the race, he comes back with his biggest score yet. And later, tempers swelter as the final auction of the day pits all of our buyers in a bidding war so intense, one of them cracks under the pressure.

programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel, where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.desc: With the girls away in Vegas for the weekend, the guys try to invent "the next big thing", but only come up with new ways to procrastinate.

programme.title: Friends S7 8
programme.desc: Chandler's irrational fear of dogs causes problems when Phoebe brings home a cute canine. Rachel's assistant gives her a Thanksgiving surprise--a kiss.

programme.title: Titans S1 4
programme.desc: Gar brings Rachel home to his family, a group of misfit medical experiments who will become known as the Doom Patrol, including Robotman, Negative Man and Elastigirl.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: the Road Warrior
programme.desc: In the post-apocalyptic Australian wasteland, a cynical drifter agrees to help a small, gasoline rich, community escape a band of bandits.

programme.title: Rebel Without A Cause
programme.desc: James Dean stars in a movie that shocked the United States with a performance that still electrifies the screen twenty-five years after his untimely death prior to the film's release. In this archetypal drama of teenage angst and rebellion, three high school students who should lead idyllic lives in their stable, comfortable suburban families explode with a violence and sexuality that their parents cannot understand. This film--which ripped the façade from the post-war American dream to expose the rage of the country's youth--resonates with an energy that has made it a modern classic and a powerful coming-of-age story.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S6 4
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore - that still has the seashore in it - and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's "out-of-this-world".

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 4
programme.desc: Get your credit cards ready, because TruTV is coming at you with 20 all new inventions that will both horrify and delight! We've got a loop to make pooping in the woods even more exciting, a way to cool your man parts for optimal baby making, and asound system for the great beyond that will blow the lid off of your coffin. Supplies may be limited, but the jokes from our cast sure aren't, featuring Judy Gold, Jared Logan, and Bryan Callen.

programme.desc: The competition is off with a bang as a locker full of fishing gear sparks fast and furious bidding war that leaves the winner with a surprise catch. And later, Papa Bear scoops up a locker for a hefty price, but when he starts digging he quickly discovers his prize possession isn't exactly street legal.

programme.title: Giant
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher Bick Benedict (Hudson) and dirt-poor cowboy Jett Rink (Dean) both woo Leslie Lynnton (Taylor) a beautiful young woman from Maryland who is new to Texas. She marries Benedict, but she is shocked by the racial bigotry of the White Texans against the local people of Mexican descent. Rink discovers oil on a small plot of land, and while he uses his vast, new wealth to buy all the land surrounding the Benedict ranch, the Benedict's disagreement over prejudice fuels conflict the runs across generations.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2)
programme.desc: When a naval officer mysteriously dies in the ‘90s, Gibbs (Austin Stowell) and the team travel to the small dust-blown town of Serenity, Calif., where they encounter secret-harboring residents, an uncooperative sheriff and an investigation that will reverberate for decades.

programme.title: Doc (Season 1)
programme.desc: A mass casualty event requires all hands-on deck at Westside Hospital. Amidst the chaos, Gina deals with a devastating revelation and Amy's forced to confront her demons.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: A dangerous investigation collides with pivotal personal and professional decisions, pushing the team to their limits.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 7)
programme.desc: The team searches for a serial killer as Nyla struggles with the aftermath following the attack. Lucy’s relationship with Seth takes a turn, while Bailey battles her fear of Jason Wyler.

programme.desc: In the penultimate leg of the Race, the remaining four teams travel through Portugal, where they look to earn their place in the final.

programme.desc: Money Mind is a weekly magazine programme centering on personal finance. Every week, the programme offers tips on how to grow, save and spend your money wisely.

programme.title: CNA Correspondent
programme.desc: They're your eyes and ears around the globe. CNA's network of correspondents shines a light on stories from their corners of the world, from groundbreaking events to up-and-coming trends.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Asia First
programme.desc: (Live) Top stories, business news and market updates from across the region as Asia gears up for the day ahead.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a young man desperately searches for clues about his trapped situation. The unsettling truth actually lies in a sequence of viral videos and they gradually corrupt his mind…

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn

programme.title: Impermanence

As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Tear Us Apart
programme.desc: After their young daughter’s mysterious disappearance, Drew and Helen retreat to a secluded woodland cottage for therapy. As they struggle to salvage their marriage, isolation fractures their sanity. Haunted by visions and strange events, Helen can no longer tell what is real as her mind unravels.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. When the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at an abandoned building — only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Waning Moon
programme.desc: Nuanchan is a famous and highly respected spiritual medium in a rural village in Thailand. She wants to train her niece, Ploy, to succeed her and Ploy needs to remain a virgin. When Ploy falls in love with her childhood friend Tul, their lives are in danger as the secret of the spiritual world is being unveiled.

programme.title: Ten Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Amy gets bitten by a rabid bat during her last graveyard shift as a veteran punk rock disc jockey. When a storm traps Amy, her mysterious replacement and an anxious staff inside their small-town radio station, reality starts to distort as they go deeper into the graveyard shift…

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jing Wen, a struggling drama student, takes on a modelling job to help cover her tuition costs. As she becomes a model for an enigmatic artist specializing in expressive human body sketches, Jing Wen accidentally uncovers a shocking truth, plunging her into a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Rooftop

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3)
programme.desc: An argument between former NFL player Travis Rudolph and his ex-girlfriend escalates into a gunfight with her brother and his friends.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles—wives who stray from their husbands with disastrous results, a deadly case of online catfishing, and a lonely young woman who has an affair with a killer.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: The action picks up both on the water and off as one of the summer's biggest events descends upon the Lake of the Ozarks: The Shootout powerboat races.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: Behind the murder of a devoted husband lies a dangerous secret—an illicit relationship that transforms jealousy into a deadly plot within one family.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Spring Valley's Haitian community is rocked when a civic leader is murdered. It takes police nearly two decades to sift through the rumours and solve a mystery filled with lies and dark secrets.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1)
programme.desc: When the Singapore Police need help, they turn to Lim Chin Chin, the Director of Forensic Chemistry and Physics Laboratory.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1)
programme.desc: Watch how cyber-sleuths like Erik Laykin crack cyber crimes as well as hiring hackers to tap into the cyber underworld.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: CI Asia: Missing In Bali
programme.desc: When 8-year-old Engeline mysteriously disappears, police, the public and a clairvoyant uncover dark secrets as they search for her.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A teen gets nabbed for being in the wrong place at the wrong time, while a man who left town with a warrant gets caught when he returns for his aunt's funeral and faces a one million dollar bail.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A 73-year-old murder suspect trashes the interrogation room; a married mother of three admits to a 26-year-old cold case killing; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Investigators interrogate a prison inmate about an unsolved serial killer case from the 90s; a former police sergeant is questioned about the murder of his mistress; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a Georgia college student disappears, police open an investigation into a possible hate crime and abduction. However, Dr. Jamie Downs uncovers evidence that spins the case in a new direction.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When the blood-smeared car of 27-year-old Stefanie Watson is found in a Maryland parking lot, her family holds out hope she's still alive.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: In 2019, Jim's daughter, Elesha, lost her job and needed a place to stay so she moved. Moving in with Jim however, dealing with the hoard has been the most difficult part of her life.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: When officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping and murder scene, body cam captures every tense moment of the standoff with the suspect.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn. The investigation into her death takes her family on a harrowing journey.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.desc: Just after sunrise, investigators respond to a local hospital where an elderly woman is fighting for her life after a brutal six-hour assault. Though injured, the victim can describe the vicious assault.

programme.desc: After an 80-year-old woman vanishes, local police and the FBI team up in the pursuit of a suspected serial killer.

programme.desc: Years after Gary Coleman’s controversial and tragic death, his ex-wife agrees to take a polygraph test to confront lingering suspicions and silence the rumours that she was responsible for his death.

programme.desc: When reliable 22-year-old, Molly Jane Matheson, didn't show up for work, her mother Tracy drove to her Fort Worth, Texas apartment to check on her.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A fight at a marijuana dispensary ends with a stabbing, and a couple faces life-changing charges. A 22-year-old rapper is delighted by his mugshot but not by spending his birthday in jail.

programme.title: CI Asia: Top Terrorist
programme.desc: Police hunt for the mastermind of the 2009 Jakarta bombing, but are stunned to find the bombing's signature matches that of a long-dead terrorist.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: Just after sunrise, investigators respond to a local hospital where an elderly woman is fighting for her life after a brutal six-hour assault. Though injured, the victim can describe the vicious assault.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After an 80-year-old woman vanishes, local police and the FBI team up in the pursuit of a suspected serial killer.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Years after Gary Coleman’s controversial and tragic death, his ex-wife agrees to take a polygraph test to confront lingering suspicions and silence the rumours that she was responsible for his death.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: Alaska State Troopers pursue gas thieves, use pepper balls to arrest a barricaded suspect and respond to shots fired in a remote village—showing the risks of policing Alaska’s wild terrain.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After years of torment, Nicole files for divorce, embarking on a new chapter that includes a risky affair with one of OJ's close friends. But a failed reconciliation led Nicole to a final, fatal stand.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: When reliable 22-year-old, Molly Jane Matheson, didn't show up for work, her mother Tracy drove to her Fort Worth, Texas apartment to check on her.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A fight at a marijuana dispensary ends with a stabbing, and a couple faces life-changing charges. A 22-year-old rapper is delighted by his mugshot but not by spending his birthday in jail.

programme.title: CI Asia: The "tooth 16" Sex Fiend
programme.desc: A criminal poses as a patient in the dental clinics of Manila and then robs and rapes their staff. Amidst an attack, he reveals he can speak the local dialect, leaving a clue for the police.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: On July 9th, 2018, officers from the Beckley Police Department received a distressing call from a woman claiming that she and her friends had been kidnapped and terrorised at the Travelodge on Harper Road.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A road rage suspect attacks a bailiff in court; a grieving mother screams at the hit-and-run driver who killed her daughter; a jury bungles the sentencing phase of a murder trial; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted triple murderer battles with the judge during sentencing; a shirtless defendant fires his lawyer; a sleepy jailbird calls the judge her best friend; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Arthur Shawcross tells a lot of stories about his life before he began to kill. He might have been known for killing women along Rochester's Genesee River, but his first murder was years earlier.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: Lake Ozark PD Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula must remove a rowdy woman causing trouble at one of the bars, but the real trouble begins back at the station when her flirtations kick into overdrive.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Shawna Forde was convicted for a 2009 crime that resulted in the violent murders of Raul Flores and his 9-year-old daughter Brisenia. She was sentenced to death.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25)
programme.desc: After a 14-year-old boy is shot to death outside of a friend's house, detectives wonder if he was caught in the middle of a sinister plot.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: Detective Angela Carter takes over the case of a missing teenage girl and wonders if the key to her disappearance could lie shockingly close to home.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Strip-Tease
programme.desc: Programme synopsis: A is for Attachment (1/3); A is for Adoption (2/3); A is for Apocalypse (3/3) (2000) Annick, a ''universal mother'', and her Scout leader husband are no ordinary couple. More of a charitable partnership, they welcome children without counting the cost. A child is priceless...

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: A magazine about the people of the sea. An invitation to set sail for a programme rich in voyages, discoveries and fascinating encounters with those for whom the sea is their life, the ocean-lovers and the high-seas adventurers.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Chateau !
programme.desc: In turn, a medieval fortress, royal residence or sumptuous prison, Amboise Castle is quite unique. Leonardo da Vinci even wanted to be buried there! Troussay is the smallest castle in the Loire Valley. Protecting heritage is at the heart of its concerns.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures
programme.desc: In the small hamlet of Kulusuk, Greenland, the guide Marie-Josee Talbot welcomes hikers from Quebec. The group is ready to walk several hours per day to discover the fjords and glaciers of the coast, the wonders of a still unspoilt environment.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Chef Pays
programme.desc: Chef Leila Albert prepares a savory tart with tomatoes, basil pesto, and moringa powder.

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: Garance La Fata visits the 2024 edition of Festi'neuch, one of the key cultural events in the Neuchatel region.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Chateau !
programme.desc: In turn, a medieval fortress, royal residence or sumptuous prison, Amboise Castle is quite unique. Leonardo da Vinci even wanted to be buried there! Troussay is the smallest castle in the Loire Valley. Protecting heritage is at the heart of its concerns.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: A magazine about the people of the sea. An invitation to set sail for a programme rich in voyages, discoveries and fascinating encounters with those for whom the sea is their life, the ocean-lovers and the high-seas adventurers.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode
programme.desc: To celebrate his fifteen years in haute couture, Julien Fournie has called on some sublime feminine archetypes. He discusses his work as he reveals his spring-summer 2024 collection.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Passe-Moi Les Jumelles
programme.desc: Step into the fascinating world of barn owls with world-renowned biologist Alexandre Roulin.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Village Des Endormis
programme.desc: As a murderer, Lucas, manages to escape during a prison transfer, a strange phenomenon turns life upside down in a village: one after another the locals fall into a long sleep. Martin, police captain on the verge of divorce, has to find Lucas amidst an overwhelming climate of collective panic.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: We meet a man of excellent taste, the French pastry chef and chocolatier Pierre Herme, undisputed king of the macaroon and much more. Learn all about the story of the Perfecto. Fancy jewellery by Imai: in keeping with contemporary styles. The right way to wear a shirt.

programme.title: Maitres
programme.desc: In Strasbourg, a law firm specialising in the legal rights of foreigners. Through their tenacity, humour and professionalism, Christine Mengus and Nohra Boukara attempt to find humane solutions when confronted with the injustice of certain situations. They are often the lawyers of last resort...

programme.title: 47 Pouces
programme.desc: One night, seven-year-old Zelie sees her Aunt Clara arrive at the family home. The young woman is sad, has bandages on her wrists and does not leave her room.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora
programme.desc: Mrs Turcotte continues to try to close the door on her past, but it refuses to leave her in peace.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora
programme.desc: Remi tries to reconnect with the past by offering Julianne his support when she gives birth, but not everyone approves.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles
programme.desc: Microplastics are invading the river and contaminating aquatic wildlife. Researchers and artists unite to raise awareness and offer innovative solutions to this invisible pollution.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Les Speciaux
programme.desc: In Berlin, Viola and Jan explore an urban monastery founded by Swiss people and home to several families. Then on to Hamburg, where the German adventure ends in... a theatre and with a nomadic couple who travel across Europe in a bus.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes
programme.desc: In Calvados, David Gallienne meets Aude and Antoine, who run a craft microbrewery. Together, they create a surprising recipe: a beer and spent grain brookie topped with a hop-infused creme anglaise.

programme.title: Le Voyage De Fanny
programme.desc: At the height of the Second World War, 12-year old Fanny looks after her younger sisters in a home, far from their parents. Forced to flee suddenly, she finds herself leading a group of eight children on a dangerous journey across occupied France to reach the Swiss border.

programme.title: La Mort Du Petit Cheval
programme.desc: Gaby is thrown out by her mother, without even a pair of shoes, but with her cat. She quickly ends up at her sister's place.

programme.title: Partir Un Jour
programme.desc: Julien left his home town to build himself a bigger life in Paris, leaving his memories behind him. But one day the published author and future father has no choice but to return.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a disused hangar, the whole Jewish Orthodox community of Strasbourg is plunged into mourning. The police asks: Anti-Semitic crime or murder committed by someone close to the victim? Wagner dives into this sensitive investigation.

programme.title: Serieux ?
programme.desc: Marie-eve tries to understand how Quebec produces its ''green'' electricity and follows a family as they set out to reduce their daily energy consumption. Mathieu eats local and in even in the street with a walk along an edible pavement, the ''Promenade des Saveurs''.

programme.title: Poulets Grilles
programme.desc: Who killed Sofia Popova, the cleaning lady at the Leroy family hotel? The 4th brigade is determined to prove its effectiveness in this investigation. But when a second murder occurs, the main suspect turns out to be Eva. Time is running out to prove her innocence and unmask the killer.

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: En Marge Du Monde
programme.desc: Initially a photographer, Flaminio became a nomadic shepherd before returning to his childhood village in the province of Bergamo. On the outskirts of Ardesio, he lives without running water, electricity or telephone, makes his clothes, and eats what he grows. Solitary but popular, he participates in the annual Zenerù festival.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles
programme.desc: Microplastics are invading the river and contaminating aquatic wildlife. Researchers and artists unite to raise awareness and offer innovative solutions to this invisible pollution.

programme.title: Chroniques D'En Haut
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: L'Invite

programme.title: C Dans L'Air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Mon Plus Beau Village
programme.desc: Joelle Scoriels, Gerald Watelet, David Jeanmotte and Livia Dushkoff, Adrien Devyver, Nathalie Guirma, and Martin Charlier each take it in turns to present a different municipality in Wallonia, one that, in their eyes, offers everything you could possibly want!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: En Terre Animale
programme.desc: Muffin and Praline may be wearing life jackets, but it's impossible to dive deep enough into the calanques to meet the protected species swimming there... In the garrigue, however, Franck Menestret and his two mascots learn more about the endangered endemic species.

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: Rosa Kanno, eco-responsible stylist, creates made-to-measure clothing. Rejecting fast fashion, Rosa designs dresses using 3D modeling, which allows her to adjust creations to the clients' body shapes and limit fabric waste. A Franco-Belgian accessories designer, Sarah Levy creates hybrid pieces designed to free the body and adapt to contemporary movement. Committed to local and sustainable production, she works with Brussels workshops to refine her prototypes in leather and recycled nylon.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: Meetup in sunny Yverdon-les-Bains to test the knowledge of the day's candidates.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Mon Plus Beau Village
programme.desc: Joelle Scoriels, Gerald Watelet, David Jeanmotte and Livia Dushkoff, Adrien Devyver, Nathalie Guirma, and Martin Charlier each take it in turns to present a different municipality in Wallonia, one that, in their eyes, offers everything you could possibly want!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Four little dinosaurs, Rocky, Bill, Tiny and Mazu, discover a dangerous world where the mysterious Gigantosaurus, the most ferocious of all the dinosaurs, is forever on the prowl. The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode
programme.desc: 'Ideas are to be caught on the wing'', so said the designer Agnes Trouble who ''doesn't like fashion''. Her cut is simple and eternally on trend. An interview to coincide with her autumn-winter 2024-2025 runway show.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Bon Debarras
programme.desc: For this first episode we are in Chamoson in the canton of Valais, with Jerome Vouillamoz, manager of the local tip. Our craft workers for today: Heike Marro and Nicolas Fontaine.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Jeunesses !
programme.desc: In the canton of Vaud, the new year is starting nosily in the streets of Chavornay. The works for the next Giron festival are starting and important elections are being held in the surrounding area. Youths start rehearsing a new play not without difficulty.

programme.title: Jeunesses !
programme.desc: Spring is taking root in the Vaud countryside. Tension is rising in Grandvaux and the theatre contest is finally starting. In Moulins, a youth shoot-out is being organised; in Corcelles, we learn how to waltz; in Chavornay, the Giron festival is starting to take shape.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Hasni Bekheira grew up in Grenoble, in the Teisseire neighborhood, where he learned hairdressing at a very young age. Without a diploma but driven by passion, he created Street Coiff. The principle: a chair, clippers and free haircuts for homeless people or detainees. Today recognized, he is proud of this tool of dignity and dialogue.

programme.title: Carte Blanche A Sonia Wieder-Atherton
programme.desc: Cellist Sonia Wieder-Atherton reveals herself through her eclectic musical choices, from Vivaldi to Schubert, from Shostakovich to Nina Simone, via Bach and Pascal Dusapin. An exceptional intimate portrait that captures the intensity of an artist who transcends boundaries and constraints.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: We meet a man of excellent taste, the French pastry chef and chocolatier Pierre Herme, undisputed king of the macaroon and much more. Learn all about the story of the Perfecto. Fancy jewellery by Imai: in keeping with contemporary styles. The right way to wear a shirt.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a disused hangar, the whole Jewish Orthodox community of Strasbourg is plunged into mourning. The police asks: Anti-Semitic crime or murder committed by someone close to the victim? Wagner dives into this sensitive investigation.

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs
programme.desc: Sam and Mario visit the Sorel Islands to reveal what is probably one of Canada's largest ship graveyards.
